hero_subtitle: Generate SEO-optimized pages for local businesses in minutes.
about_hero_subtitle: We believe that every local business deserves a chance to be found online. That's why we created LocalLeads - to help you connect with customers in your area.
about_story_title: Our Story: Empowering Local Businesses in a Digital World
about_story_paragraph1: LocalLeads was founded in 2026 by a dedicated team of marketing and technology experts. We recognized a significant challenge faced by countless local businesses: the struggle to gain visibility online amidst the dominance of larger corporations and complex digital marketing landscapes. We witnessed firsthand how plumbers, electricians, cleaners, and other essential local services were often invisible to potential customers who were actively searching for them online.
about_story_paragraph2: Driven by a passion to level the playing field, we embarked on a mission to create an accessible, affordable, and highly effective solution. LocalLeads was born from the belief that every local business, regardless of size, deserves the opportunity to connect with their community and thrive in the digital age. Our goal is simple: to make local SEO effortless and impactful for you.
about_mission_paragraph: Our mission is to empower local service businesses by providing them with the tools and strategies to achieve unparalleled online visibility. We strive to be the bridge that connects hard-working local entrepreneurs with the customers who need them most, fostering growth, sustainability, and community prosperity.
about_values_accessibility: Accessibility: We believe powerful SEO solutions should be available to everyone, not just those with large budgets or technical expertise.
about_values_effectiveness: Effectiveness: We are committed to delivering tangible results, helping our clients genuinely get more leads and customers.
about_values_simplicity: Simplicity: We cut through the complexity of digital marketing, offering straightforward solutions that are easy to understand and implement.
about_values_integrity: Integrity: We operate with transparency and honesty, building trust with every business we serve.
about_values_community: Community Focus: We champion local economies and support the businesses that form the backbone of our neighborhoods.
about_cta: Ready to see your business dominate local search results? Generate your pages today or get a free audit to see your potential!
pricing_hero_title: Simple, One-Time Pricing: Get Found, Stay Found.
pricing_hero_subtitle: Invest once for lasting local SEO impact. Choose the plan that fits your business needs and get a powerful suite of SEO-optimized landing pages designed to capture customers in every town you serve. No subscriptions, just results.
pricing_starter_feature1: Up to 50 Hyper-Local Pages: Target your core service areas effectively.
pricing_starter_feature2: Built-in SEO Optimization: Pages designed to rank high in local search results.
pricing_starter_feature3: Mobile-First & Responsive Design: Flawless experience on any device.
pricing_starter_feature4: Ideal for new businesses or highly focused local services.
pricing_pro_feature1: Up to 200 Hyper-Local Pages: Expand your reach across more towns and services.
pricing_pro_feature2: Advanced SEO Structuring: Deeper optimization for competitive keywords.
pricing_pro_feature3: Mobile-First & Responsive Design: Ensures accessibility and performance.
pricing_pro_feature4: Includes everything in Starter, plus extended coverage.
pricing_pro_feature5: Perfect for growing businesses looking for wider local dominance.
pricing_agency_feature1: Up to 1000 Hyper-Local Pages: Maximize your presence across entire regions.
pricing_agency_feature2: Comprehensive SEO Strategy: Tailored for extensive geographic and service targeting.
pricing_agency_feature3: Mobile-First & Responsive Design: Top-tier user experience across all devices.
pricing_agency_feature4: Includes all Pro features, scaled for ultimate local market saturation.
pricing_agency_feature5: Best for multi-location businesses or marketing agencies.
pricing_whitelabel_feature1: Unlimited Clients: Manage all your clients under one roof.
pricing_whitelabel_feature2: Custom Branding: White-label the platform with your own brand.
pricing_whitelabel_feature3: Client-Facing Dashboard: A dashboard for your clients to track their results.
pricing_whitelabel_feature4: Dedicated Support: Get priority support from our team.
pricing_usage_based_description: We're excited to announce that a new, flexible pricing model is available. With usage-based pricing, you'll be able to purchase credits and generate pages as you need them. It's the perfect solution for businesses with fluctuating needs or those who want to start small and scale up over time.
contact_hero_subtitle: We'd love to hear from you! Whether you have a question about our services, pricing, or anything else, our team is ready to answer all your questions.
audit_hero_title: Get Your Free Local SEO Audit
audit_hero_subtitle: Discover how many potential customers you're missing out on and unlock your local search potential.
audit_results_message1: Thank you for submitting your information. We are generating your personalized SEO audit report. You will receive an email shortly with detailed insights on your local search potential.
audit_results_message2: In the meantime, explore how LocalLeads can help you capture more local customers:
generate_hero_subtitle: Unlock local search visibility. Provide your business details, and we'll instantly create a suite of SEO-optimized landing pages tailored for every town you serve.
generate_step1_description: Provide your business name, the specific services you offer, and all the towns you want to target.
generate_step2_description: Our system instantly creates unique, SEO-optimized landing pages for each service in each town.
generate_step3_description: Receive a ZIP file with all your new pages, ready to be uploaded to your website.
generate_form_description: Fill out the form below to get started. Be as specific as possible with your services and list all target towns for best results.
generate_loading_message: Generating your pages... This may take a moment.
